User.title: User
User.description: User profile with community reputation and locality

locality.description: The locality or sector the user belongs to

reputation.description: User's reputation points earned from reporting and upvoting

reportsCount.description: Number of issues reported by this user

votesGiven.description: Number of upvotes given by this user

role.description: Role of the user (member, coordinator, admin)

Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: A reported civic issue with auto-category, priority, and location

locality.description: The sector or locality this issue belongs to

cat.description: Issue category (e.g., Road Damage, Water Leakage, Streetlight, Waste Management, Infrastructure, Other)

reporterUid.description: Firebase Auth UID of the reporter

upvoters.description: Array of user UIDs who upvoted

authority.description: Estimated public authority responsible for fixing the issue

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to uploaded issue image or a preset test sample image

videoUrl.description: Optional URL to uploaded issue video

verifiers.description: Array of coordinator UIDs who verified this

CommunityMessage.title: CommunityMessage
CommunityMessage.description: Message shared on the locality-specific public discussion board

locality.description: The locality discussion board this belongs to

uid.description: Firebase Auth UID of the poster

text.description: Content of the comment or discussion

likers.description: Array of user UIDs who liked this

official.description: Is this message an official announcement by a coordinator

/issues/{issueId}.description: Civic issues reported across all areas
